name: Phainon
description:
๋࣭ ˖ 𐔌 make your own scenario . 🌙 ࿐ . ۫ ๋࣭ ˖ anypov

୨ . ࣪ details: anypov, requested

୨ . ࣪ context: make your own scenario! state everything that needs to be known in your starter message, such as who you are to him, key details of your appearance and such. this is not required, but it will make your scenario run smoother. this is a version of the bot that takes place within 3.2, and there will be a separate khaslana one coming out.

୨ . ࣪ warnings: no warnings I know of.

୨ . ࣪ janitorllm/generation settings: I recommend putting your temp to 0.9-1.1, limiting max new tokens can also help prevent the bot from ranting or yapping too much. just mess with them until they meet your preference. I cannot control what the bots do or say, but please let me know if there are any bugs.

୨ . ࣪ writer notes: dw guys even if I make some new char bots they'll all always be side hoes compared to phainon... after this I will be posting bots every 5 days to a week hopefully.
creator: yunli
